headline: Huntington Ingalls Industries vs. Lockheed Martin: Which Industrial Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Shipbuilding dominance meets aerospace diversification as both companies post robust 2025 financials but differ sharply in risk and valuation.

headline: Ondas (ONDS), Lockheed Martin Collaborate to Integrate Sentrycs Technology into Sanctum Counter-UAS Platform
summary: Ondas Inc. (NASDAQ:ONDS) is one of the high growth NASDAQ stocks to buy now. On June 23, Ondas announced a collaboration to integrate its subsidiary Sentrycs’ Cyber-over-RF technology into Lockheed Martin’s Sanctum, an advanced modular Counter-UAS platform. This integration aims to bolster defense against complex aerial threats, such as drone swarms, by adding a precise, […]

headline: Jefferies Turns More Cautious on Lockheed Martin (LMT) Ahead of Q2 Earnings
summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE:LMT) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 25, Jefferies lowered its price recommendation on Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE:LMT) to $575 from $595. It reiterated a Hold rating on the stock. The firm expects second-quarter revenue growth to accelerate to 5%, but trimmed its earnings-per-share estimate […]
